Loss % by origination cohort — cumulative losses ÷ originated ($K stacked bars, loss % line)

Bars = originated ($K) per cohort month. Lines on right axis = % of that cohort’s originated balance currently 30–60 / 60–90 / 90–120 DPD (amber/orange/red) and cumulative loss % (black). Recent cohorts understated as losses accrue over time.

Loss by underwriting vintage — initial line assigned vs 120+ DPD balance as % of line

X-axis = month of initial underwrite decision. Bars = total credit line assigned at first underwrite ($K). Red line = 120+ DPD balance at current snapshot as % of line assigned (right axis). A high loss % for a vintage indicates that cohort of obligors is underperforming relative to the line they were given. Recent vintages understated as losses take time to develop.

Monthly charge-offs ($K principal)
OatFi Credit Risk  ·  DPD methodology: days_in_delinq, curr_upb > 0 — exact match to credit dashboard. No lms_lbh_status filter. No charged_off_date exclusion from DQ rates. Leading indicator: past partner due_date, not yet past OatFi mat_dt. Loss rate: first 120 DPD crossing or chargeoff ÷ trailing 12m originations × 12. Utilization >120% excluded. Partners and orgs under $10K excluded.
